# Cha0smagick Labs — Occult Apps, Technomancy & Digital Esoteric Tools

> Corporate Techno-Sorcery Solutions — since 2025. Premium occult apps for Android, free online divination tools, digital grimoires, and educational resources for witches, mages, and practitioners of all magical traditions.

## Tools (Free Online)

- [Candle Color Calculator](https://cha0smagicklabs.com/tools/candle-color-calculator.html)
- [Digital Pendulum](https://cha0smagicklabs.com/tools/digital-pendulum.html)
- [Astrology Sign Calculator](https://cha0smagicklabs.com/tools/astrology-sign-calculator.html)
- [Spell Builder](https://cha0smagicklabs.com/tools/spell-builder.html)
- [Sigil Generator](https://cha0smagicklabs.com/tools/sigil-generator.html)
- [I Ching Oracle](https://cha0smagicklabs.com/tools/iching.html)
- [Viking Runes Oracle](https://cha0smagicklabs.com/tools/viking-runes.html)
- [Lunar Phase Calculator](https://cha0smagicklabs.com/tools/lunar-phase.html)
- [Tengwar Transcriber](https://cha0smagicklabs.com/tools/tengwar-transcriber.html)
- [All Free Tools](https://cha0smagicklabs.com/tools/index.html)

## Technical Notes

- **Language:** Primary English (EN), some Spanish (ES) for activador-servidores
- **Canonical URLs:** `https://cha0smagicklabs.com/` with `.html` suffix on all pages
- **Schema types:** SoftwareApplication, WebApplication, FAQPage, QAPage, HowTo, Article, ContactPoint, AggregateRating
- **Sitemap:** [sitemap.xml](https://cha0smagicklabs.com/sitemap.xml)
- **CSS:** Single minified stylesheet (`style.min.css`)
- **JS:** `app-render.min.js`, `apps-data.min.js`, `visitor-map.min.js`, `shared.min.js`
- **Analytics:** Google Analytics G-V6LHCPN9TK (privacy-first, denied by default)
- **Theme:** Dark theme, mobile-responsive
